title: Runner V4 direct endpoint status check
note: Direct command avoids Runner V4 action string bug. Wait 2 minutes before writing devam et.
command: Write-Output 'TASK: Runner V4 direct endpoint status check'; Write-Output 'PROGRESS: 100%'; Write-Output 'TIME:'; Get-Date; Write-Output '--- compose ps with override ---'; docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.aays-fast-start.yml ps 2>&1; Write-Output '--- api command ---'; docker inspect terrayield_land_api --format '{{json .Config.Cmd}}' 2>&1; Write-Output '--- endpoint tests ---'; foreach ($ep in @('/health','/openapi.json','/map/listings','/map/sales-layers/verified-history','/map/sales-history/status','/map/sales-history/external-evidence','/map/sales-history/parcels','/map/sales-history/combined')) { try { $sw=[System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew(); $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ('http://localhost:8010' + $ep) -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 45; $sw.Stop(); Write-Output ('OK ' + $ep + ' status=' + $r.StatusCode + ' ms=' + $sw.ElapsedMilliseconds + ' bytes=' + $r.Content.Length) } catch { Write-Output ('FAIL ' + $ep + ' error=' + $_.Exception.Message) } }; Write-Output '--- recent geography/status errors ---'; docker logs --tail 180 terrayield_land_api 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'Only lon/lat|Traceback|Exception|ERROR|/map/sales-history/status' -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -Last 80 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line }; Write-Output 'DIRECT_STATUS_CHECK_DONE'
